Internal Deal Memo

Project Codename: Operation Sunrise

To: Ms. Tan Wei Ming  
From: Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Date: 15 October 2023  

Subject: Acquisition of Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd.

We are pleased to report that the terms for the acquisition of Stellar Innovations Pte. Ltd. have been finalized. The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") outlines a total consideration of SGD 45,000,000. Mr. Ramasamy Muthu has reviewed the SPA, and all parties have agreed upon the outlined financial terms. The deal is expected to close by Q1 2024.

Please note, the project plan does not indicate any changes to the current operational structure of Stellar Innovations. The project status is on track for completion as scheduled.

Key Contacts:  
- Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
  - Email: siti_aishah@corporate.sg  
  - Phone: +65 6123 4567  
- Ms. Tan Wei Ming  
  - Email: wei_ming.tan@business.sg  

For further details, you may access the documents via the secure link https://example.sg/user/S 123 4567 A. Stellar Innovations' UEN is T16LL1234D.

Please ensure all communications remain confidential until the public announcement.
